title: WHI-8: CacheResult decorator — review PR #37
description: Review and fix PR #37 (branch: cache-result-decorator). Linear: WHI-8. Add decorator caching last terminal result for N time units. Area: packages/core/src/nodes/decorators/

title: WHI-13: Frame Decoder buffer — review PR #36
description: Review and fix PR #36 (branch: fix/frame-decoder-buffer-strategy). Linear: WHI-13. Optimize FrameDecoder to stop allocating new Uint8Array on every chunk. Area: packages/studio-transport/
closeReason: Reviewed PR #36, fixed ensureCapacity to compact-before-grow, added 3 buffer tests. All quality gates pass.

title: WHI-5+12: Batch inspector + profiler perf — review PR #39
description: Review and fix PR #39 (branch: feat/batch-inspector-processing). Linear: WHI-5 (parent) + WHI-12 (child). Batch process multiple tick records in inspector modules. Also improve profiler performance for large trees. Area: packages/core/src/inspector/
closeReason: Reviewed PR #39 batch inspector processing. Created clean PR #41 (feat/batch-inspector-processing-v2) with only batch additions: RingBuffer.pushMany, TickStore.pushMany, Profiler.ingestTicks/removeTicks, TreeInspector.ingestTicks, useInspector batch integration. Removed unrelated regressions from original PR.

title: WHI-6: Collapsible subtree nodes — review PR #38
description: Review and fix PR #38 (branch: feat/collapsible-subtree-nodes). Linear: WHI-6. Support collapse/uncollapse of Subtree node children in the UI. Area: packages/studio-ui/, packages/react/

title: WHI-9: Optimize display state tracing
description: Linear: WHI-9. Only send displayState over the wire when a change occurred. Options: dirty-flag boolean reset each tick, or tracked proxy objects. Maximize UX. Area: packages/core/src/base/, packages/core/src/nodes/
closeReason: Only emit displayState when changed: BehaviourTree caches serialized state per node (JSON.stringify), TickStore.getSnapshotAtTick carries forward last known state. Tests added for dedup and carry-forward.

title: PR #40: Docs review
description: Review PR #40 (branch: claude/elastic-jepsen). Docs: trim redundancy, fix inaccuracies, fill gaps. Verify accuracy against current code.

title: WHI-7: Screeps transport — research
description: Linear: WHI-7. Research how to integrate Screeps game agents with bt-studio server. Requires understanding Screeps API constraints. PAUSE with questions for human review.

title: WHI-10: Mutable trees at runtime — research
description: Linear: WHI-10. Support adding/removing nodes at runtime with full time-travel tracing. Complex architectural work spanning core+server+UI. PAUSE with questions for human review.

title: WHI-11: Customizable visual elements — ideation
description: Linear: WHI-11. Brainstorm and ideate new display-only node types beyond DisplayState. Multi-phase: ideation → triage → implementation. PAUSE with proposals for human review.

title: WHI-14: Tick record retention + extended time travel — research
description: Linear: WHI-14. Extend time travel to fetch older records from server on demand. Depends on batch processing (WHI-5) and other work. PAUSE with architecture questions for human review.
